creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Gerard Seibert from comment #196)

> … 𡀦upcoming FreeBSD 12.3 Release?

Where cgit lacks clarity e.g. <https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?id=ad9d0df7c66a02db53f102e87e6f8414e8da67fc&h=stable%2F13>, 
GitHub <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/commit/ad9d0df7c66a02db53f102e87e6f8414e8da67fc> and GitLab <https://gitlab.com/FreeBSD/freebsd-src/-/commit/ad9d0df7c66a02db53f102e87e6f8414e8da67fc> offer a clearer view. Cherry-picked for: 

stable/13
